Package recoder.java

Class PrettyPrinter

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.SourceVisitor
recoder.java.PrettyPrinter
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyNames
public class PrettyPrinter extends SourceVisitor implements PropertyNames
A configurable pretty printer for Java source elements. The settings of the pretty printer is given by the current project settings and cannot be changed. Instances of this class are available from ProgramFactory.getPrettyPrinter(java.io.Writer). Remember to close() the writer once finished.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface recoder.io.PropertyNames

    ADD_NEWLINE_AT_END_OF_FILE, ALIGN_LABELS, CLASS_SEARCH_MODE, ERROR_THRESHOLD, GLUE_CONTROL_EXPRESSIONS, GLUE_DECLARATION_APPENDICES, GLUE_EXPRESSION_PARENTHESES, GLUE_INFIX_OPERATORS, GLUE_INITIALIZER_PARENTHESES, GLUE_LABELS, GLUE_MEMBERS, GLUE_PARAMETER_LISTS, GLUE_PARAMETER_PARENTHESES, GLUE_PARAMETERS, GLUE_SEQUENTIAL_BRANCHES, GLUE_STATEMENT_BLOCKS, GLUE_UNARY_OPERATORS, INDENT_CASE_BRANCHES, INDENTATION_AMOUNT, INPUT_PATH, JAVA_5, JDK1_4, OUTPUT_PATH, OVERWRITE_INDENTATION, OVERWRITE_PARSE_POSITIONS, TABSIZE

  • Constructor Details

    • PrettyPrinter

      protected PrettyPrinter(Writer out, Properties props)
      Set up a pretty printer with given options. Note that it is not wise to change the options during pretty printing - nothing dangerous will happen, but the results might look strange. It can make sense to change options between source files, however.

  • Method Details

    • encodeUnicodeChars

      protected static String encodeUnicodeChars(String str)
      Replace all unicode characters above ? by their explicite representation.
      Parameters:
      str - the input string.
      Returns:
      the encoded string.

    • getWriter

      public Writer getWriter()
      Gets the currently used writer. Be careful when using.
      Returns:
      the currently used writer.

    • setWriter

      public void setWriter(Writer out)
      Set a new stream to write to. Useful to redirect the output while retaining all other settings. Resets the current source positions and comments.

    • getLine

      public int getLine()
      Get current line number.
      Returns:
      the line number, starting with 0.

    • getColumn

      public int getColumn()
      Get current column number.
      Returns:
      the column number, starting with 0.

      protected int getIndentation()
      Get indentation amount (blanks per level).

      the value of getIntegerProperty("indentationAmount").

    • isOverwritingIndentation

      protected boolean isOverwritingIndentation()
      Returns true if the pretty printer should also reformat existing code.
      Returns:
      the value of the overwriteIndentation property.

    • isOverwritingParsePositions

      protected boolean isOverwritingParsePositions()
      Returns true if the pretty printer should reset the parse positions accordingly.
      Returns:
      the value of the overwriteParsePositions property.

    • printHeader

      protected void printHeader(int lf, int levelChange, int blanks, ProgramElement x)
      Print program element header.
      Parameters:
      lf - number of line feeds.
      levelChange - the level change.
      blanks - number of white spaces.
      x - the program element.

      protected void printFooter(ProgramElement x)
      Sets end positions if required, and prints program element footer.
      Parameters:
      x - the program element.

      protected boolean printContainerComments(ProgramElement x)
      Parameters:
      x -
      Returns:
      true if any comment has been printed, false otherwise

      protected void printOperator(Operator x, String symbol)

    • visitIdentifier

      public void visitIdentifier(Identifier x)
      Description copied from class: SourceVisitor
      Visits the specified identifier. Defaults to do nothing.
      Overrides:
      visitIdentifier in class SourceVisitor
      Parameters:
      x - the program element to visit.

    • visitIntLiteral

      public void visitIntLiteral(IntLiteral x)
      Description copied from class: SourceVisitor
      Visits the specified int literal. The default implementation calls SourceVisitor.visitLiteral(recoder.java.expression.Literal).
      Overrides:
      visitIntLiteral in class SourceVisitor
      Parameters:
      x - the program element to visit.

    • visitBooleanLiteral

      public void visitBooleanLiteral(BooleanLiteral x)

      Parameters:
      x - the program element to visit.
